channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pakistan Backs Saudi Arabia at UNSC, Condemns Houthi Attacks and Calls for Dialogue
item.description: Pakistan reaffirmed its support for Saudi Arabia's security and territorial integrity at a UN Security Council briefing, condemning Houthi attacks on the kingdom. The statement came amid heightened te...

item.title: Understanding Sleep Debt and Recovery: How the Body Handles Short Sleep
item.description: The article explores the concept of 'sleep debt' and clarifies that it's not a financial obligation but a biological process. Sleep pressure, which increases with wakefulness, drives the need for rest...

item.title: Etiquette Tips for Picnics, Travel, and Social Gatherings
item.description: The article provides practical advice on social etiquette and travel considerations. It addresses picnic norms, such as bringing homemade dishes rather than pre-packaged items, and emphasizes sharing ...

item.title: Wife holds husband's legs to prevent him being sucked out of shattered Ryanair plane window at altitude
item.description: A dramatic incident occurred on a Ryanair flight from Thessaloniki in Greece to Memmingen in Germany on Friday when part of the aircraft's engine broke away and smashed through a passenger window at a...

item.title: Stigma and access to care remain barriers to mental health support in South Africa
item.description: The death of Jayden Adams, a 25-year-old footballer, has sparked renewed discussions about mental health in South Africa. Counsellor Shannon Els warns that success in sports, academics, or careers oft...

item.title: Amar Chitra Katha's comic highlights HAL's 86-year aviation journey
item.description: The article discusses the upcoming Amar Chitra Katha (ACK) comic that chronicles Hindustan Aeronautics Limited's (HAL) 86-year journey in Indian aviation. HAL, a Bengaluru-based aircraft manufacturer,...

item.title: Lifestyle Intervention Boosts Cognitive Function in Older Adults
item.description: A two-year structured lifestyle program significantly improved cognitive function in older adults, according to the LatAm-FINGERS trial published in The Lancet. The study involved 1,065 participants a...

item.title: Tropical Depression Josie Weakens, Less Likely to Impact Philippines
item.description: Tropical Depression Josie, which entered the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) on July 14, 2026, has weakened and is now classified as a tropical depression. According to the National Weather Fo...

item.title: Governor Uba Sani Appoints Key Officials to Strengthen Kaduna State Governance
item.description: Governor Uba Sani has approved a series of political appointments and constituted governing boards for key state institutions to enhance governance and service delivery in Kaduna. The appointments, an...

item.title: Satono Jasmine Aims for Victory in Key Race
item.description: The article focuses on Satono Jasmine, a horse with a strong record in provincial races, as it prepares to compete in a significant event. The piece provides detailed insights into the horse's previou...

item.title: Kibabii University College Course Offerings, Fees, and Application Guide
item.description: The article details the courses, fee structures, and application process for Kibabii University College. It highlights the diverse academic departments such as Healthcare, Business, Engineering, and C...

item.title: China's exports rise 27% year-on-year driven by AI demand surge
item.description: China's exports surged by 27% in June 2024 compared to the same period in 2023, driven by robust demand fueled by the rapid expansion of artificial intelligence applications. The customs agency report...

item.title: US and Iran escalate tensions with military strikes and UAE condemnation amid rising oil prices
item.description: The article details escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, with the US launching a five-hour military strike on multiple Iranian targets, including Bushehr, Chah Bahar, Jask, Konarak,...

item.title: US and Iran Escalate Conflict with Strikes and Retaliation
item.description: The United States has intensified its military operations against Iran, launching a third consecutive night of strikes targeting Iranian coastal and maritime facilities. These attacks, part of a broad...

item.title: Russian Opposition Figure Arrested Amid Election Campaign
item.description: Boris Nadezhdin, a prominent Russian critic of President Vladimir Putin and the war in Ukraine, was arrested by Russian authorities on Monday. The 63-year-old activist, who previously attempted to run...

item.title: Day 5 of Sara Duterte's Impeachment Trial: Key Testimonies and NBI Findings
item.description: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte entered its fifth day with key developments in the proceedings. Zuleika Lopez, a close aide, is set to testify on Article 4, which accuses Duterte ...

item.title: Tanzania's Industrial Growth Recognized at 50th Sabasaba Trade Fair
item.description: The 50th edition of the Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (Sabasaba) concluded with President Dr Hussein Ali Mwinyi emphasizing Tanzania's industrial progress. During his visit to the GF Pavilion...

item.title: Tinubu Appoints Experienced Leaders to Boost Investment and Industrial Growth
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu has approved the appointment of Eyitope Kola-Oyeneyin and Muhammad Hadi Mutallab as chairpersons of the Nigerian Investment Promotion Commission (NIPC) and the Nigerian Exp...

item.title: Corruption Allegations Plague NSW Liberals and Labor in Victoria
item.description: The article explores the growing corruption scandals engulfing both the New South Wales Liberal Party and the Victorian Labor government, highlighting how political parties have become conduits for ve...

item.title: FBI and Pakistan Strengthen Counterterrorism Collaboration
item.description: The U.S. Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) director Kash Patel held a meeting with Pakistan's Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi at the FBI headquarters, expressing appreciation for Pakistan's support...
